channel.title: Event on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Event on jamesm.blog

item.title: AI Conferences Worth Following
item.description: A practical guide to the AI conferences worth following, who each type of event is for, and how to choose the right one before spending time or money.

item.title: AWS Summit London (2023) - Agenda
item.description: Complete agenda of AWS Summit London 2023 with session codes, titles, and difficulty levels for all conference presentations.

item.title: AWS Summit London (2023) - Agenda now available
item.description: AWS Summit London 2023 announcement with agenda, keynote information, and technical session details.

item.title: List of DevOps Conferences
item.description: List of major DevOps conferences and summits for learning about cloud infrastructure, operations, and industry best practices.
